entries.name: direct
entries.description: Trace region outlines into filled vector paths (potrace).

entries.name: halftone
entries.description: Fill regions with a regular grid of variable-size dots, optionally rotated to a per-ink screen angle.

entries.name: stippling
entries.description: Fill regions with randomly scattered dots.

entries.name: crosshatch
entries.description: Parallel pen strokes (optional crossed 90° pass) — disconnected runs, more pen-lifts than eulerian_hatch but simpler to tune per layer.

entries.name: contours
entries.description: Fill regions with concentric inner outlines — a topographic-map feel.

entries.name: edges
entries.description: Trace the region boundary — a line-art / technical-drawing style.

entries.name: centerline
entries.description: Trace the medial skeleton as single-stroke polylines — ideal for schematics and line art. Thick filled regions collapse to a single line at the centre, which is intentional but may surprise on photos.

entries.name: spiral
entries.description: Fill regions with a single Archimedean spiral clipped to the mask.

entries.name: scanlines
entries.description: Horizontal scan lines clipped to the mask — flat or sinusoidal.

entries.name: tsp
entries.description: Legacy: dots connected by a greedy nearest-neighbour tour. Prefer ``tsp_opt`` — same idea with shorter total travel.

entries.name: hilbert
entries.description: Fill regions with a Hilbert space-filling curve — one continuous stroke per region, optionally tone-adaptive.

entries.name: gosper
entries.description: Fill regions with a Gosper flowsnake — organic hexagonal space-filling stroke.

entries.name: eulerian_hatch
entries.description: Parallel hatches stitched into one continuous zig-zag per island — drastically fewer pen-lifts than crosshatch.

entries.name: concentric_offset
entries.description: Spiral inward via morphological erosion — near-continuous stroke, very few pen-lifts per region.

entries.name: flowfield
entries.description: Long streamlines following the image gradient or smooth noise — few pen-lifts, organic feel.

entries.name: tsp_opt
entries.description: TSP-art with 2-opt or MST optimisation — shorter total travel than the legacy greedy tour.

entries.name: voronoi_stipple
entries.description: Centroidal Voronoi stippling — evenly-spaced dots, optionally weighted by darkness.

entries.name: squiggle
entries.description: Wiggly horizontal lines with amplitude / frequency drift — hand-drawn squiggle look.

entries.name: lowpoly
entries.description: Low-poly facets — a Delaunay triangulation of scattered points, drawn as edges. Denser points read darker.

entries.name: scribble
entries.description: Sketchy hand-drawn hatching — wobbly, overshooting strokes for a loose pencil feel.

entries.name: grid
entries.description: Square mesh of horizontal and vertical strokes clipped to the mask.

entries.name: brick
entries.description: Running-bond brick pattern: horizontal courses with staggered vertical mortar joints, clipped to the mask.

entries.name: dashes
entries.description: Dashed hatching — parallel strokes chopped into short dashes for a stitched / engraving texture.

entries.name: truchet
entries.description: Truchet tiles — a grid of randomly oriented diagonals making a maze-like graphic fill.

entries.name: rings
entries.description: Concentric circles about the region centroid, clipped to the mask.

entries.name: sunburst
entries.description: Radial rays fanning out from the region centroid, clipped to the mask.

entries.name: circle_pack
entries.description: Packs non-overlapping circle outlines into the region — the bubble / foam generative fill.

entries.name: ridge_lines
entries.description: Horizontal lines displaced upward by darkness — the pulsar-plot ridge / mountain-range texture.

entries.name: hitomezashi
entries.description: Hitomezashi sashiko stitches — phase-shifted dash rows and columns weaving an interlocking textile pattern.

entries.name: cubic_disarray
entries.description: Cubic disarray (Schotter) — a grid of squares tumbling into disorder where the region is darkest.

entries.name: quadtree
entries.description: Quadtree subdivision — squares split recursively where the region is darkest, turning tone into cell density.

entries.name: maze
entries.description: Perfect maze — a random spanning tree carved over the region, walls drawn between unconnected corridors.

entries.name: phyllotaxis
entries.description: Phyllotaxis — sunflower-spiral dots from the centroid, sized by local darkness.

entries.name: voronoi_mosaic
entries.description: Voronoi mosaic — cracked-glaze cell walls, cells smaller where the region is darker.

entries.name: curve_stitching
entries.description: Curve stitching — per-cell chord fans whose envelopes read as parabolas, the nail-and-thread op-art texture.

entries.name: string_art
entries.description: String art — one continuous thread between rim pegs, chords stacked greedily where the region is darkest.

entries.name: space_colonization
entries.description: Space colonization — organic veins growing toward the darkest parts of the region, root / lightning texture.

entries.name: penrose
entries.description: Penrose tiling — aperiodic five-fold rhombi (P3) clipped to the region, the quasi-crystal texture.

entries.name: dither
entries.description: Error-diffusion dither (Floyd–Steinberg / Atkinson / Bayer) — fixed-size dots whose pattern carries the tone.

entries.name: etch
entries.description: Engraving strokes — short marks following the image's isophotes, denser and longer where darker.

entries.name: noise_contours
entries.description: Marbled topography — iso-lines of the image tone warped by fractal noise, pooling around dark features.

entries.name: reaction_diffusion
entries.description: Reaction-diffusion (Gray–Scott) — organic Turing spots/stripes grown inside the region, denser where darker.

entries.name: superpixel_hatch
entries.description: Painterly patches — SLIC superpixels each hatched along their own dominant orientation, spacing from local darkness.

entries.name: moire
entries.description: Moiré interference — two offset ring or line gratings whose beat pattern forms op-art fringes.

entries.name: weave
entries.description: Basket weave — horizontal and vertical ribbons interlacing over/under at alternating crossings.

entries.name: honeycomb
entries.description: Honeycomb — hexagonal lattice clipped to the region, or tone-scaled hex cells in 'scaled' mode.

entries.name: harmonograph
entries.description: Harmonograph — a damped twin-pendulum figure traced as one long decaying stroke.

entries.name: attractor
entries.description: Strange attractor — a chaotic orbit (de Jong / Clifford) scattered into the region as smoky dot filaments.

entries.name: text_fill
entries.description: Text fill — rows of repeated single-stroke text become the shading texture (typewriter-art portraits).

entries.name: lsystem
entries.description: L-system — dragon curve, branching plant, Koch island or Sierpiński arrowhead fitted to the region.

entries.name: chladni
entries.description: Chladni figures — nodal lines of a vibrating plate, the sand-pattern symmetry of resonance experiments.

entries.name: sine_halftone
entries.description: Horizontal waves whose frequency and amplitude follow the tone — the sound-wave portrait.
